Home/ISO 45001 Certification in UAE

ISO 45001 Certification Consultant in Dubai, UAE

ISO 45001 certification in Dubai, UAE is a standard for Occupational Health and Safety Management System (OHSMS). Get ISO 45001: 2018 certification in less than 3 weeks. ISO 45001 aims at reducing unacceptable work risks and reliably improving the performance of OHSMS. ISO 45001 standard can be applied to all types of organizations and set ups irrespective of nature, type and size of business. It lays a bunch of rules that builds a system by specifying the requirements for your organization's OHSMS. Adjusting your organization's OHSMS with ISO 45001 can essentially reduce the risk and enhances the safety and brings down the incidents of injury and disease in the work environment.

ISO 45001 Certification in Dubai, UAE

Fundamentals of ISO 45001

ISO health and safety standard is the replacement of 18001, it makes coordination with other management systems easier than before; since it shares the new normal structure characterized by Annex SL, it is directly lined up with the 2015 revisions of ISO 14001 and ISO 9001.

You can discover more data about ISO 45001: 2018 standard and better understand the difference between ohsas 18001 iso 45001. Existing OHSAS 18001 clients of Wizms, can get migration support and can implement and generate a gap analysis report that must be completed preceding a migration audit.

Migration from OHSAS 18001 Certification

After achieving ISO 45001 certification, the OHSAS 18001 norms will be removed. A transition period of 3-years will be allotted to the OHSAS 18001 certified organizations. The guidelines defined by the International Accreditation Forum (IAF) have to be followed before migration from present OHSAS 18001 to ISO 45001 certification. Transition of OHSAS 18001 has to follow any of the two routes:

Route 1: Authorized OHSAS 18001 Certification

An authorized OHSAS 18001 certification will be relocated through a consistent cycle to ISO 45001:2018 during the 3 years after distribution as indicated by IAF.

Route 2: Non-Authorized OHSAS 18001 Certification

A non-authorized OHSAS 18001 certification will follow a particular system which will make the transition to ISO 45001:2018 as smooth as possible.

Basic Steps to get ISO 45001 Certification in Dubai, UAE

Stage 1: Learn

Organizations should understand the guidelines of ISO 45001 standard (ISO 14001 and ISO 9001 if you are consolidating them). Learn the easy ways to meet the requirements of iso 45001 occupational health and safety management systems.

Stage 2: Perform Gap Analysis and Initial OHSMS ISO 45001 audit

Choose the right ISO certification consultant in Dubai to perform Gap Analysis for your organization. Get ISO 45001 certification in UAE, Dubai at best price with the help of WIZMS who can implement ISO 45001 in a simpler and faster way. Complete the risk assessment iso 45001 with the identification of hazards, evaluations of risks and determination of controls.

Stage 3: Plan

Create a project plan for your organization to meet the ISO 45001 Occupational Health and Safety Management Systems.

Stage 4: Training

Provide adequate OHSMS 45001 training to your employees to meet OHSMS 45001 Management System.

Stage 5: Document

To get ISO safety certification, every organization must plan and document their OHSMS ISO 45001 Health and Safety Manual and Procedures. The greatest part of the project is to look at the issues in the current process and update them to address the requirements of ISO 45001 standard. Once the process is modified or developed to meet the ISO safety certification, you should control those processes. Documenting the process is essential to get ISO 45001 certification.

Stage 6: Use and Improve Your OHSMS

When your system is created and documented, employees will follow the procedures, gather records and make necessary improvements to ISO 45001 safety management system.

Stage 7: Audit ISO 45001

Is your OHSMS ISO 45001 working? Our ISO consultant in Dubai will conduct an internal audit to perceive how is your ISO 45001 management system functioning and how you can improve it.

Stage 8: Achieve ISO 45001 Registration

After completing the above stages, now your organization is ready to register for ISO 45001 certification. Regular surveillance audit will be conducted for 6 to 12 months. You must know how to advertise your ISO 45001 certification.

ISO 45001 Certification Cost in UAE

ISO 45001 Certification Cost in UAE is made up of an initial consultancy fee and an annual fee.

1Consultancy Fee

  • Our ISO 45001 consultant in UAE's first visit to your place of business
  • Prepare documentation regarding the requirements of ISO 45001
  • A second visit to your organization to confirm that everything is in place for ISO 45001 certification
  • Final step is ISO 45001 Certification and registration process

2Annual Fee

  • Perform yearly audits to ensure that your organization remains ISO 45001 certified
  • Ongoing support and maintenance from ISO 45001 consultants in UAE to help you get the most out of your occupational health & safety management system

What affects the cost of ISO 45001 certification?

Cost of ISO 45001 certification affects on various factors specific to each organization. These include:

•

Industry sector

Different industries have varying risk levels

•

Number of Offices

Multiple locations increase scope

•

Annual turnover

Costs scale based on organization size

•

Number of employees

Larger workforce needs more training

ISO 45001 Certification Process

Stage 1: Quote Request & Documentation

Complete a Quote Request Form so our ISO 45001 certification consultant in Dubai can understand your organization and requirements. You can fill the Quote Request Form online. Our ISO consultant will utilize the data and define the scope of the organization and provide you ISO 45001 occupational health and safety procedures.

Stage 2: Initial Certification Audit

In the next stage of ISO 45001 management system, an appointment is booked with our ISO 45001 consultant. Two mandatory visits are required that structure the Initial Certification Audit. It would be ideal that your organizations management system has been completely operational for at least three months and it has been subject to management review and perform full cycle of internal audits to get ISO 45001 certification in Dubai.

Stage 3: Certificate Issuance

By following a successful two stage audit, ISO 45001 certification is issued by Wizms. Wizms provides the hard and soft copy of ISO certification for health and safety. ISO 45001 Certification is valid for 3 years. Benefits of ISO Certification is benefited through annual surveillance audits and recertification audits of ISO 45001.

Key Features of ISO 45001 Certification in UAE

Although ISO 45001 is a new standard, its foundations are already defined in OHSAS 18001. Organizations that have already implemented an occupational health and safety management system as per OHSAS 18001, and effectively practice those guidelines in the organizations can have a smooth transition to ISO 45001.

The fundamental differences are:

  • ISO 45001 implements the 'High Level Structure' (HLS), giving it a typical system with other management systems such as, ISO 9001 and ISO 14001.
  • ISO 45001 spots extraordinary responsibility towards senior management. This has been executed in the revised version of ISO 9001 and ISO 14001 guidelines.
  • ISO 45001 will give new catalyst for occupational health and safety practices in organisations. This translates into additional opportunities for promoting and protecting employees' health and performance, as well as a sustainable improvement of employee motivation.

Wizms offer ISO 14001 certification consulting services in Dubai, Sharjah, Ajman, Al Ain, Fujairah, Abu Dhabi, and Ras al-Khaimah.

FAQ ISO 45001 Certification in Dubai

What is the difference between ISO 45001 Vs OHSAS 18001?

OHSAS 18001 certification was dealing with health and safety risks and issues related to it and it is a procedure-based certification. While the ISO 45001 certification in Dubai was focusing on the relationship between the workplace and the organization, it is a process-based certification. This helps to minimize or wipe out the opportunity of any hazards.

What are the benefits of ISO 45001 certification?
  • Having a smooth relationship with employees, clients, providers and stakeholders.
  • Diminished personal time and lower working expenses.
  • Consumers trust and reputation.
  • Tax benefits.
What is the purpose of ISO 45001?

ISO 45001:2018 certification in UAE determines the requirements of health and safety risks (OH&S), and gives direction for its utilization, to empower associations to give safe and healthy work environments by preventing business related injury and chronic sickness, just as by proactively improving its OH&S execution.

Why OHSAS 18001 change to ISO 45001?

ISO 45001 certification in UAE mainly an international standard to certify your businesses or organizations while OHSAS 18001 focuses on OH&S risks and other internal issues.

How much does ISO 45001 Cost?

ISO 45001 certification cost relies upon some factors like review span, association size, scope of risk, current degree of consistence and so forth. To get a precise ISO 45001 certification costs, demand a statement from your third party. Wizms is the best ISO consultant in Dubai, offers competitive rates and never utilizes hidden charges.

How should we determine the risks and opportunities when implementing ISO 45001 certification?

At the point when the association comprehends the necessities and desires for invested individuals and key requirements, it would then be able to utilize the knowledge to access any risks and opportunities that might be available and afterwards make a move to address them.

Does ISO 45001 certification replace the need for other certifications?

No, ISO 45001 certification in Dubai does not swap the requirement for other certifications like ISO 14001 certification and ISO 9001 certification in Dubai. ISO 45001 is intended for OHS frameworks, and although they follow a similar framework structure, ISO 14001 and ISO 9001 are focussed on various controls like Environment and Quality.

Is ISO 45001 a watered-down version of OHSAS 18001?

No. ISO 45001 certification is standard utilizing an established structure based on a viable administration model. ISO 45001 certification in Dubai is intended to be utilized as a feature of a business management system. ISO 45001 certification in Dubai underlines expands focus on worker health and safety programs, workforce participation, and implements other changes.

What are the objectives of ISO 45001 certification?

ISO 45001 has two principle objectives:

  • To guarantee the word related health and safety of laborers, service providers, and guests.
  • To guarantee consistency to these principles by organizations and businesses.
Should my business be guaranteed with ISO 18001 or would it be advisable to wait for ISO 45001?

Getting ISO 45001 certified in UAE will be a decent intermediate step. When ISO 45001 certification is introduced, your ISO 18001 will not be a valid one. A transition time period is three years to get ISO 45001 certification.

What are the ways to earn ISO 45001 Certification?

To get ISO 45001 certification in Dubai, organization should implement the standard and complete the evaluating and certification process with the help of third parties like Wizms, the best ISO consultant in Dubai. The certification process includes a two-stage review and maintaining the certification requires yearly observation audit and recertification for every 3 years.

What are the benefits of swot analysis in ISO 45001?

SWOT analysis with focus on your organization's ISO 45001 certification, you will be able to determine the internal and external problems that may affect your OHSMS and also the ability to satisfy your organization's performance and goals. With SWOT analysis, you can effectively determine the risks and opportunities that are needed to be considered for the long run of ISO 45001 OHSMS certification. SWOT analysis is a very useful tool which can be used to determine and narrow down strength, weakness, opportunities and threat from all areas of your organization in relation to ISO 45001 OHSMS standard.

Checkout the benefits of swot analysis in ISO 45001.
